name: Indra Sugara
title: Full Stack Developer
subtitle: Engineer across Web, Mobile, and Cloud Systems
bio: I am a developer who works on making software systems that can grow and make a difference. I have worked on both full-stack development and mobile apps. I like using my strong backend skills and modern web technologies to solve real-world problems. I'm always looking for new ways to build intelligent systems for real-life situations.

projects.name: LegalEasier
projects.description: AI-powered legal document assistant for simplifying legal processes and document management.
features: Developed an AI-powered legal assistant utilizing NLP for document analysis and summarization.
Built a responsive Flutter mobile app with clean architecture and state management.
Integrated backend APIs with Node.js and PostgreSQL for scalable data management.
Enhanced usability with real-time collaboration features across devices.

projects.name: Miniatur Cloud
projects.description: A lightweight cloud platform console for managing infrastructure and deployments.
features: Built a comprehensive cloud management console with modern web technologies.
Implemented real-time monitoring dashboard with interactive charts and metrics.
Designed RESTful APIs for resource provisioning and management.
Created automated deployment pipelines with CI/CD integration.

projects.name: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Interactive developer portfolio with AI-powered chatbot for engaging visitor experience.
features: Designed a modern dark-themed portfolio with particle animation background.
Integrated AI chatbot using DeepSeek API for interactive Q&A about skills and experience.
Built with vanilla HTML/CSS/JS for maximum performance and minimal bundle size.
Implemented smooth scroll, typing animation, and glassmorphic UI components.

experience.description: Built and maintained full-stack web applications using React and Node.js. Collaborated with the team to design RESTful APIs and implement responsive UI components. Improved application performance by 30% through code optimization.
Developed cross-platform mobile applications using Flutter and Dart. Delivered multiple projects for clients including e-commerce apps, task management tools, and social platforms.

chat.welcome_message: Halo! 👋 Saya AI assistant dari Indra Sugara. Tanya apapun tentang skill, project, atau pengalaman saya!
suggested_questions: Tech stack apa yang kamu kuasai?
